personas.name: The Overwhelmed Team Lead
goals: Keep the team aligned without endless meetings
Have visibility into blockers before they become crises
Report upward without spending hours in spreadsheets
pain_points: Context switches constantly — loses flow state
Team uses 5+ tools; nothing talks to each other

behavior.usage_pattern: daily, during morning standup and EOD wrap

personas.quote: I know what's happening in theory, but surfacing it for others takes forever.

personas.name: The Scaling Startup PM
goals: Ship fast without accumulating technical debt
Stay close to customers without losing execution speed
pain_points: No dedicated design or data resources
Stakeholder alignment is ad hoc and fragile

behavior.usage_pattern: throughout the day, heavy Monday + Friday

personas.quote: I'm the PM, designer, analyst, and sometimes QA. I need leverage.

personas.name: The Enterprise Buyer
goals: Standardize how teams work across the org
pain_points: Security and compliance requirements slow adoption
Change management is the real blocker
personas.quote: Show me the ROI and I'll get you the budget.
